subject: use uuids for ticket and project ids
lastOutput:
es, matching the existing project ID format. This eliminates the scan-all-tickets-on-create pattern and makes both entity types use the same ID scheme.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/17
`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
The key change was in `server/store.ts:97-100` — replacing 6 lines of auto-increment logic (`listTickets()` + `reduce` to find max + `String(maxId + 1)`) with a single `randomUUID().slice(0, 8)` call. This is a nice example of how UUIDs simplify ID generation: no need to read existing state, no race conditions if two creates happen concurrently, and IDs are now consistent between tickets and projects.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Done. The change replaces sequential integer ticket IDs with 8-character UUID prefixes, matching the existing project ID format. This eliminates the scan-all-tickets-on-create pattern and makes both entity types use the same ID scheme.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/17
